findings.title: component is missing manufacturer part metadata
findings.message: Schematic component R1 is missing manufacturer or MPN metadata.
findings.remediation: Add manufacturer and manufacturer part number metadata.

findings.title: component is missing manufacturer part metadata
findings.message: BOM row R1 is missing manufacturer or MPN metadata.
findings.remediation: Add manufacturer and manufacturer part number metadata.

findings.title: kicad-cli is unavailable
findings.message: kicad-cli was not found, so KiCad-backed ERC and DRC checks were skipped.
findings.remediation: Install KiCad CLI or configure kicad-cli-path.
